'''Shayl Le'tah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who was able to combine her innate abilities offered by [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and her inherent talent for covert operations that come from being a Bothan. She was known for her skills as a [[Jedi investigator/Legends|Jedi investigator]].

Her [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]] included [[Alter (Jedi Order)|Alter]], [[Battlemind]], [[Control]], and [[Force sense/Legends|Force sense]].

==Behind the scenes==
Shaly Le'tah is described in the ''[[State of the Arts|Star Wars Galaxies Update]]'' article in [[Star Wars Gamer 3|''Star Wars Gamer'' 3]]. She is concept art by [[Arnie Jorgensen]] for the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.
